scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=worker.js --legal-comments=inline --banner:js="// AUTO-GENERATED from src/ — do not edit directly. Run 'npm run build'."
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run obfuscate && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:plain: npm run build && wrangler deploy --main worker.js
